temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dark, stone-walled corridor, a group of people in black robes are seen in a flurry of motion. A man in a white shirt is pushed aside as a blonde woman in a black robe runs past. Another man in a white shirt follows, and they all hurry through a circular stone archway into an even darker, misty area. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a sense of immediate danger and escape. The characters are fleeing from an unseen threat, and the dark, oppressive environment adds to the suspense.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, dramatic orchestral swell with a deep, booming sound effect, followed by the sound of rushing air and footsteps.)
(00:04-00:07) The camera pans quickly across a long, dark, arched hallway. A single figure can be seen running in the distance, illuminated by a faint light from behind. The walls are lined with repeating stone arches, creating a sense of immense, oppressive space. (Storyline: This shot establishes the vast, labyrinthine nature of the location, suggesting the characters are trapped in a large, dark structure. The lone runner highlights their isolation and desperation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The dramatic, orchestral score continues, building tension.)
